title: Working from Home for the First Week

all.en: On Monday morning, I set up a tiny office at the corner of my dining table.
all.zh: 星期一早上，我在餐桌一角設置了一個小型辦公空間。

all.en: My cat decided that my laptop keyboard was the most comfortable place to nap.
all.zh: 我的貓認定我的筆電鍵盤是最舒服的午睡地點。

all.en: I joined my first video meeting and accidentally left my microphone muted.
all.zh: 我參加了第一場視訊會議，卻不小心忘了打開麥克風。

all.en: My boss laughed kindly and reminded everyone to check their settings.
all.zh: 老闆友善地笑了笑，提醒大家檢查自己的設定。

all.en: Without a commute, I had extra time to make a real breakfast every morning.
all.zh: 少了通勤時間，我每天早上都有空做一頓像樣的早餐。

all.en: On Wednesday, I almost forgot what day it was because everything blended together.
all.zh: 星期三那天，我幾乎忘記是禮拜幾，因為每一天都混在一起了。

all.en: I struggled to separate work hours from personal life within the same four walls.
all.zh: 在同樣的四面牆裡，我很難把工作時間和私人生活分開。

all.en: My back started aching from the wooden chair, so I bought a cushion online.
all.zh: 我的背因為坐木椅而開始痠痛，所以上網買了一個坐墊。

all.en: By Friday, I had developed a simple routine, including short walks in the afternoon.
all.zh: 到了星期五，我已建立起簡單的作息，包括下午的短時間散步。

all.en: Video calls with the team made me feel connected, though I missed the casual chats.
all.zh: 與團隊的視訊通話讓我覺得有所連結，但我仍懷念那種隨興的閒聊。

all.en: By the weekend, I realized working from home suited me better than I had thought.
all.zh: 到了週末，我發覺在家工作其實比我原本想像的還適合自己。

all.en: By the second Monday, I had moved my workspace from the dining table to a proper desk.
all.zh: 到了第二個星期一，我把工作區從餐桌搬到了正式的書桌。

all.en: I bought a wireless headset that made long video meetings much more comfortable.
all.zh: 我買了一副無線耳機，讓長時間的視訊會議舒適許多。

all.en: My cat slowly learned to nap somewhere else, though she still demanded attention at noon.
all.zh: 我的貓慢慢學會去別的地方睡午覺，雖然中午仍要求我陪她。

all.en: I scheduled lunch breaks away from the screen to protect my tired eyes.
all.zh: 我安排離開螢幕的午休時間，以保護我疲倦的眼睛。

all.en: A neighbor and I started exchanging short morning greetings during our coffee runs.
all.zh: 我和鄰居開始在買咖啡時互道簡短的早安。

all.en: My productivity actually improved because I could focus without office interruptions.
all.zh: 我的生產力其實提升了，因為沒有辦公室的干擾讓我能專注。

all.en: However, I missed celebrating small wins with my teammates in person.
all.zh: 然而，我懷念與隊友當面慶祝小成就的感覺。

all.en: To stay connected, we started a weekly virtual coffee chat every Friday afternoon.
all.zh: 為了保持聯繫，我們每週五下午開始固定的視訊咖啡聊天。

all.en: I also joined an online fitness class to keep my body active during the workday.
all.zh: 我也參加了線上健身課程，讓身體在工作日仍能保持活躍。

all.en: My manager praised my consistent results during our monthly performance review.
all.zh: 在月度績效檢討時，我的主管稱讚我表現穩定。

all.en: By the third week, working from home had become a comfortable and familiar rhythm.
all.zh: 到了第三週，在家工作已經成為一種舒適又熟悉的節奏。

all.en: I invested in a good office chair that finally solved my long-standing back pain.
all.zh: 我投資了一把好的辦公椅，總算解決了長期困擾我的背痛問題。

all.en: My morning ritual now included stretching, journaling, and a short meditation session.
all.zh: 我的晨間儀式現在包含伸展、寫日記和短暫的冥想。

all.en: My team started rotating who would lead the Monday meeting to keep things fresh.
all.zh: 我們團隊開始輪流主持星期一的會議，讓內容保持新鮮感。

all.en: I painted one wall behind my desk a soft green to brighten my video call background.
all.zh: 我把書桌後方的一面牆漆成柔和的綠色，讓視訊背景更顯亮眼。

all.en: My productivity peaked in the mornings, so I scheduled creative work before lunch.
all.zh: 我的生產力在早晨最高，所以我把創意工作安排在午餐前。

all.en: On rainy afternoons, I lit a small candle and brewed strong coffee while writing reports.
all.zh: 在下雨的午後，我會點上小蠟燭、泡一杯濃咖啡，一邊寫報告。

all.en: My cat finally accepted that the keyboard belongs to me during weekday business hours.
all.zh: 我的貓終於接受了平日上班時間鍵盤是屬於我的。

all.en: I joined a virtual book club with coworkers, which sparked surprising friendships.
all.zh: 我和同事們參加了線上讀書會，意外結下了令人驚喜的友誼。

all.en: At the end of the month, I knew I had truly mastered the work-from-home lifestyle.
all.zh: 到了月底，我知道自己已經真正掌握了在家工作的生活方式。

all.en: By the second month, I had decorated my home office with plants and small artworks.
all.zh: 到了第二個月，我用植物和小型藝術品布置了我的居家辦公室。

all.en: My cat had finally accepted her own bed beside my desk as her new daytime spot.
all.zh: 我的貓終於把書桌旁的自己的床當作了新的白天休息地點。

all.en: I discovered that natural sunlight in the morning improved both my mood and focus.
all.zh: 我發現早晨的自然陽光能同時改善我的情緒和專注力。

all.en: My partner and I created a polite signal system to avoid interrupting each other's calls.
all.zh: 我和伴侶建立了一套客氣的暗號系統，避免打擾彼此的通話。

all.en: On Wednesday afternoons, I worked from a quiet local café to refresh my routine.
all.zh: 星期三下午，我會到附近一間安靜的咖啡店工作，為日常增添新意。

all.en: The barista there remembered my favorite drink and always greeted me with a warm smile.
all.zh: 那裡的咖啡師記得我最愛的飲品，總是用溫暖的微笑迎接我。

all.en: I started keeping a simple gratitude journal to mark three small wins each evening.
all.zh: 我開始寫一本簡單的感恩日記，每晚記錄三項小小的勝利。

all.en: My company offered a flexible hybrid arrangement, which gave me the best of both worlds.
all.zh: 公司提供彈性的混合辦公制度，讓我能兼顧兩種工作方式的優點。

all.en: On the rare days I went into the office, my teammates greeted me like a returning friend.
all.zh: 在我難得進辦公室的日子，隊友們像迎接老朋友一樣歡迎我。

all.en: My once-tiny dining table corner had grown into a productive and peaceful little world.
all.zh: 我那個曾經狹小的餐桌一角，已成長為一個高效又寧靜的小天地。

all.en: By the third month, my home office had become a true creative sanctuary for me.
all.zh: 到了第三個月，我的居家辦公室已成為真正屬於我的創意小天地。

all.en: I added a soft floor lamp that gave the room a warm evening glow.
all.zh: 我添購了一盞柔和的立燈，為房間帶來溫暖的夜晚光暈。

all.en: My partner and I began sharing weekly cooking nights with healthy homemade recipes.
all.zh: 我和伴侶開始每週一晚共煮，使用健康的自製食譜。

all.en: The barista at my regular café gave me a loyalty discount on my favorite latte.
all.zh: 我常去的咖啡館咖啡師給了我最愛拿鐵的常客折扣。

all.en: My online book club expanded to include readers from three different countries.
all.zh: 我的線上讀書會擴大了，現在有來自三個不同國家的讀者。

all.en: We discussed novels every Friday evening over warm tea and shared screen photos.
all.zh: 我們每週五晚上一邊喝熱茶，一邊分享螢幕畫面，討論小說。

all.en: My morning meditation grew longer, and my focus during meetings noticeably improved.
all.zh: 我的晨間冥想時間拉長了，會議中的專注力也明顯提升。

all.en: I started mentoring a remote intern who lived in a different time zone entirely.
all.zh: 我開始指導一位遠距實習生，她住在完全不同的時區。

all.en: She thanked me for showing her that working from home could feel meaningful too.
all.zh: 她感謝我讓她明白，在家工作同樣能充滿意義。

all.en: My once-tiny home office had grown into the most peaceful workplace I had ever known.
all.zh: 我曾經狹小的居家辦公室，已成長為我所知最寧靜的工作場所。

all.en: By the sixth month, my remote intern had started leading her own small product features.
all.zh: 到了第六個月，我的遠距實習生已開始主導她自己的小型產品功能。

all.en: We celebrated her promotion with a virtual cake-cutting attended by colleagues from four cities.
all.zh: 我們以一場視訊切蛋糕慶祝她的升遷，來自四座城市的同事都出席了。

all.en: My company asked me to design an official remote-onboarding guide for new hires worldwide.
all.zh: 公司邀請我設計一份正式的遠距入職指南，供全球新進員工使用。

all.en: I included practical tips on workspace, lighting, breaks, and gentle daily boundaries.
all.zh: 我納入了關於工作區、燈光、休息和溫柔日常界線的實用建議。

all.en: My partner laughed when our home was photographed for the company's internal newsletter feature.
all.zh: 公司內部電子報專題報導刊登我們家照片時，我的伴侶笑了出來。

all.en: The barista at my favorite café framed one of those photos and hung it proudly behind her counter.
all.zh: 我最愛咖啡館的咖啡師把其中一張照片裱起來，驕傲地掛在櫃檯後方。

all.en: On rainy weekends, I now hosted small writing retreats at my dining table for remote friends.
all.zh: 在下雨的週末，我會在餐桌上為遠距朋友舉辦小型寫作聚會。

all.en: We shared warm soup, quiet music, and gentle conversation about meaningful weekly projects.
all.zh: 我們分享熱湯、輕音樂，以及關於每週有意義專案的溫柔對話。

all.en: My once-stiff back had healed completely, thanks to consistent stretching and the new chair.
all.zh: 我那曾經僵硬的背已完全康復，多虧持續伸展與新買的椅子。

all.en: What started as a tiny dining-table corner had bloomed into a peaceful global community hub.
all.zh: 從餐桌一角開始的小空間，已綻放成一個寧靜的全球社群中心。
